completed-initiatives.title: Full restoration from git
completed-initiatives.rationale: Recover all completed initiative summaries from prior plan versions

sqlite-disposition.title: Park with rationale
sqlite-disposition.rationale: Add to Parked Issues with clear explanation: complete after prompt restoration

opmode-disposition.title: Park with rationale
opmode-disposition.rationale: Acknowledge the planning work — don't silently drop it

backlog-auto-disposition.title: Cancel — manual /backlog is sufficient
backlog-auto-disposition.rationale: Manual /backlog command works and is actively used

dec-collision.title: Renumber current → DEC-AUDIT-002
dec-collision.rationale: Current decision is newer — easier to renumber (only in plan + 1 code reference)

issue-triage.title: Individual triage — review each issue
issue-triage.rationale: Most thorough — each issue gets a proper disposition

trajectory.title: Strategic reset — fix the foundation first
trajectory.rationale: Address all reckoning findings: restore history, triage issues, fix collisions
